title: AI agents vs AI chatbots: what are companies actually using in production today?
summary: AI agents vs AI chatbots: what are companies actually using in production today?
whyItMatters: It feels like everyone is talking about AI agents right now, but when I look at actual production systems, most companies still seem to rely heavily on chatbots or assistant-style tools. From what I’ve seen, chatbots still handle a lot of repetitive workflows, while agents are mostly used in more controlled environments where they can execute specific tasks…
